allow: Bash(# Check if node_modules was ever committed \(it was removed in fba0391\) git log --all --diff-filter=A --name-only --pretty=format:""%H %s"" -- ''node_modules/*'')
Bash(# Search for any hardcoded URLs that look like real Zulip instances git log --all -p --full-diff -- ''src/'')
Bash(# Check the node_modules committed content for any secrets \(just zod, but let''s be sure\) git show 68d885e -p -- ''node_modules/.package-lock.json'')
Bash(# Check for any git-tracked .env or secret files in current working tree git ls-files)
Bash(# Double check: search entire git history for Zulip API key format \(32-char hex string which is Zulip''s format\) git log --all -p --full-diff)
Bash(# Final check: look for any webhooks, callback URLs with secrets, or AWS/GCP/Azure config git log --all -p --full-diff)
Bash(# Check if there are any base64-encoded secrets in config files grep -rnE ''btoa|atob|Buffer\\.from.*base64'' /opt/openclaw-dev/plugins/openclaw-zulip/src/)
Bash(# Check if remote branches have the node_modules commit git log --all --oneline --remotes)
